overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a desert wind farm in the Badlands. The player walks along a cracked asphalt highway and ventures off-road through cactus-dotted terrain, passing damaged wind turbines with Night City visible in the distant haze. Sparse vehicle traffic passes by on the road.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the road edge, approaching a smoking wind turbine

entered.detail: damaged wind turbine with black smoke billowing from the top, red and white striped blades
cracked asphalt highway with faded lane markings
multiple wind turbines scattered across the desert landscape
dry bushes and desert vegetation along the roadside
hazy mountains forming the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sun-baked desert highway lined with wind turbines. The camera walks forward along the cracked asphalt road, passing dry scrub vegetation. A prominent damaged wind turbine emitting black smoke stands ahead in the center of the frame, with mountains visible in the hazy distance.

events.description: turns left off the asphalt road into the desert terrain

agents.ego_description: turning off the road and walking into the desert among saguaro cacti, moving away from the highway

entered.detail: distinctive wind turbine with a large circular ring structure at the top
tall green saguaro cacti scattered throughout the desert sand

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left off the highway and ventures into the desert interior. The asphalt road disappears behind as the perspective moves through sandy terrain dotted with saguaro cacti. A distinctive wind turbine with a large ring structure becomes visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: curves back toward the road, with asphalt becoming visible again on the right

agents.ego_description: walking through deep desert terrain, passing between cacti and circling back toward the highway

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the desert wind farm, the camera moves deeper among the cacti and scrub brush. The large ringed turbine shifts to the left as the path curves, and the asphalt road gradually reappears in the distance on the right side of the frame.

events.description: returns to the asphalt road from the desert terrain
red motorcycle speeds past on the road
black SUV drives past on the road

agents.ego_description: walking parallel to the highway as vehicles occasionally pass by, heading toward the distant city

notable_agents.action: red motorcycle speeding past on the road heading away from the camera
black SUV driving along the road toward the camera's direction

entered.detail: cracked asphalt highway with lane markings
roadside signpost on a metal pole
distant futuristic city skyline visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to the roadside, walking parallel to the cracked asphalt as the desert gives way to the highway edge. A road sign appears on the left while the distant skyline of Night City becomes visible ahead. Sparse traffic passes by, including a red motorcycle and a black SUV, as the journey continues along the wind farm highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins on a desolate desert highway and ventures into the arid interior before returning to the roadside. It begins by walking along cracked asphalt past dry scrub and a damaged wind turbine emitting black smoke against a backdrop of hazy mountains. As the camera turns left, the road disappears and the perspective shifts into sandy terrain dotted with saguaro cacti, moving toward a distinctive turbine with a large ring structure. The scene then curves deeper into the wind farm among the brush, causing the ringed turbine to shift left while the highway gradually reappears in the distance on the right. Finally, the camera returns to the roadside edge, passing a road sign and sparse traffic, including a red motorcycle and a black SUV, as the distant skyline of Night City emerges on the horizon.
